title: pleiocardia foliosa
intro: Pleiocardia foliosa, also known as the leafy Pleiocardia, is a type of marine bivalve mollusk, specifically a species of clams in the family Teredinidae. The leaves of the plant are not a part of this marine bivalve mollusk but this information suggests that the plant is likely to be found in the coastal regions where it grows. However, I was unable to find any information about a plant by that name, but it is possible that it is a type of seaweed.
